package rulecoverage

func PositiveValidationErrorResponseShapeInconsistent() string {
    ruleID := "validation_error_response_shape_inconsistent"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers in the same API module that emit different validation error contracts."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
